user_story: As a Manager, I want to view a list of employee advance requests with added date, title, employee, department, additional expenses and requested advance amount, so that I can review my team's advance requests at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Advance Expenses screen; When the list loads; Then each request shows added date, title, employee name, department name, additional expenses, requested advance and status

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter advance requests by active or inactive employees, so that I can focus on the relevant employee set
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Advance Expenses screen; When I select Active employees or Inactive employees; Then the list is filtered to that employee status

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter advance requests by a From and To period, so that I can review requests within a specific date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Advance Expenses screen; When I pick a From and To date using the calendar and search; Then only advance requests within that period are shown

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter advance requests by department, so that I can review requests for a specific department
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Advance Expenses screen; When I select a department and search; Then only requests for that department are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter advance requests by status such as Pending with me, Pending Approval, Rejected, Cancelled or Approved, so that I can track requests by their approval stage
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Advance Expenses screen; When I select a status and search; Then only advance requests with that status are displayed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to search and reset the advance request filters, so that I can apply criteria and quickly clear them
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filter criteria; When I click Search; Then the list reflects my criteria; And when I click Reset; Then all filters return to their defaults
